# SYNAPSE

> SYNAPSE is a free, AI-powered dopamine recovery and habit tracker that helps people quit compulsive digital habits — short-form video (reels), social media, pornography, gaming, junk food, and gambling — through personalized, adaptive guidance and real-time urge support. Reset. Rewire. Rise.

SYNAPSE is a privacy-first Progressive Web App (PWA). It is a self-help behavior-change tool, not medical or clinical treatment. The method has three stages: Understand (learn your triggers and patterns), Guide (personalized interventions when you need them), and Grow (adapt as your habits change).

## Core
- [Home](https://www.synapserewire.site/): Product overview, how it works, recovery levels, and the SYNAPSE method.
- [About SYNAPSE](https://www.synapserewire.site/): Mission, vision, founders (Parth Goyal, Sandali Tiwari), and values.

## Guides
- [How to Stop Watching Reels](https://www.synapserewire.site/quit/reels): A practical, research-informed guide to quitting short-form video addiction — why it's addictive and a step-by-step plan to break the loop.

## Legal
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.synapserewire.site/privacy): How data is collected, used, retained, and protected.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.synapserewire.site/terms): Terms of use, including medical, crisis, and AI disclosures.

## Contact
